changes: Impulse Drive: Weaponskill direction requirements have been abolished, allowing combo bonuses when attacking from any position.
Impulse Drive: Potency has been set at 180.
Impulse Drive: This skill can now only be used by lancer and dragoon.
Heavy Thrust: Weapon skill direction requirements for the additional effect have been abolished.
Full Thrust: Combo potency has been increased from 330 to 360.
Phlebotomize: Potency of the damage over time effect has been increased from 25 to 30.
Chaos Thrust: Potency increased by 50 when attacking from behind.
Chaos Thrust: Potency of the damage over time effect has been increased from 30 to 35.
Life Surge: Enhanced Life Surge now reduces the recast time to 50 seconds.
Blood for Blood: Additional damage taken after acquiring Enhanced Blood for Blood trait has been reduced from 25% to 15%. The 30% increase to damage dealt remains unaffected.
Jump: Recast time has been reduced from 40 to 30 seconds.
Magic defense has been increased to values comparative to other melee DPS, archers, and bards.
Aeolian Edge: TP cost has been increased from 50 to 60.
Shadow Fang: TP cost has been increased from 60 to 70.
Kiss of the Wasp: The increased damage effect now only applies to physical attacks.
Kiss of the Viper: The increased damage effect now only applies to physical attacks.

Added level 50 support ability Stoneskin II: Creates a barrier around self and all party members near you that absorbs damage totaling 18% of maximum HP. Cannot be cast while in combat, or on a target engaged in combat. Duration: 30m.

new_content.name: The Final Coil of Bahamut
new_content.description: Players can now repeat turns prior to the weekly reset, though reward eligibility is restricted based on party composition.

new_content.name: Striking Tree (Extreme)
new_content.description: A weapon is now guaranteed to drop upon completion.

new_content.name: Akh Afah Amphitheatre (Extreme)
new_content.description: Players will receive a piece of diamond dust upon completion to enhance specific gear items.

new_content.name: Ceremony of Eternal Bonding
new_content.description: A feature allowing players to pledge everlasting devotion to a partner; includes the Special Quests journal category and exclusive rewards.

new_content.name: Wherefore Art Thou, Zodiac
new_content.description: Continuation of the Zodiac Weapon quest line.

new_content.name: The Past Is a Story We Never Tell
new_content.npc_location: Limsa Lominsa – Lower Decks (X:10 Y:11) - Deputy Postmoogle

new_content.name: Lone Survivor
new_content.npc_location: Limsa Lominsa – Lower Decks (X:10 Y:11) - Deputy Postmoogle

new_content.name: Guildmaster, Prelate, and Plot
new_content.npc_location: Limsa Lominsa – Lower Decks (X:10 Y:11) - Deputy Postmoogle

new_content.name: The Ties that Bind
new_content.description: Special quest required for the Ceremony of Eternal Bonding.

new_content.name: Stoneskin II
new_content.description: New support ability for Conjurers at level 50.

housing.name: Eternity Cake
housing.description: A family of four tended their gristmill for a full three turns of the sun to create enough flour to bake this massive tower cake.

housing.name: Starlight Dodo
housing.description: A whole dodo stuffed with savory vegetables and slow-roasted on a spit. Often prepared near the end of the year as an offering to the Twelve.

housing.name: Starlight Cake
housing.description: Conceived by Bismarck chefs with far too much time on their hands, the Starlight cake is composed of layer after layer after layer...after layer of sweet, decadent heaven.
